deferred_residuals: R-V139P5-N1 (low) — R-V138P0-02 follow-up: CLI surface of on-disk missing-file hints; defer to V1.40 UX
R-V139P5-N2 (low) — R-V138P0-04 follow-up: WorkApiDto.chapters cap or pagination; defer to V1.40 UX
